MessageInputDisabledReasonHold: Thank you! Please hold for a counsellor.
PreEngagementConfigDescription: Welcome to Kids Help Phone. To help us serve you better, please answer the following questions. If this is an emergency, please call 911.
LabelNickname: Nickname (please do not share your real name)
DoYouConsiderYourselfToBe: Do you consider yourself to be:
HomosexualAsexualBisexualPansexual: Homosexual (Gay or Lesbian), Asexual, Bisexual, Pansexual
LabelNewcomer: Are you a newcomer (i.e., Arrived in Canada within 5 years or less), recent immigrant, and/or refugee?
LabelProvince: What province or territory do you live in?
ContactingOutsideCanada: Contacting us from outside of Canada
TellMoreAboutLive: Tell us more about where you live…
Homeless: Homeless (e.g., Living in a Shelter, On the Streets, Staying with People Temporarily)
LabelScale: On a scale of 1 to 7, how upset are you right now?
BlackEthnicity: Black (e.g., African, Afro-Caribbean, African Canadian descent)
FirstNationsToNorthAmerica: First Nations [sub-category of Indigenous (To North America)]
LatinAmerican: Latin American (e.g., Latin American, Hispanic descent)
MiddleEastern: Middle Eastern (e.g., Arab, Persian, West Asian descent; Egyptian, Iranian, Lebanese, Turkish, etc.)
Asian: South, East, or Southeast Asian (e.g., Korean, Chinese, Japanese, Cambodian, Filipino, Indonesian, Laotian, Vietnamese, Pakistani, Sri Lankan, etc.)
LabelSchool: We would like to learn more about you and if you are currently a student. Do you attend...?
LabelSupportType: There are many ways our counsellors can support you. Which of these options apply best to the chat you want to have?
LabelSuicidalThoughts: Sometimes when people reach out to us, they might also be having thoughts of suicide. We really care about your safety and well-being at Kids Help Phone, we are wondering if you are having any of these thoughts. (A counsellor will also ask this question again in the session to confirm)
IWantToTalkAboutMyFeelings: I want to talk about my feelings
ImLookingForTipsAndStrategies: I'm looking for tips and strategies
IWantSupportToSolveAConflict: I want support to solve a conflict/problem
INeedHelpToBeSafer: I need help to be safer
IWantToKnowHowToHelpSomeoneElse: I want to know how to help someone else
INeedHelpFindingAResource: I need help finding a resource/information
